description: Predefined dashboards to observe any Redis database using Redis Data Source. Requires Grafana 7.1+.

targets.expr:
sum by(pipeline_id)(
  sum by (pipeline_id) (pipeline_end_time)
  -
  sum by (pipeline_id) (pipeline_start_time)
) * 1000
AND ON (pipeline_id)
  topk(5, max by (pipeline_id) (pipeline_start_time))

sum by(pipeline_id)(
  http_request_total{code=~"4..|5..", client=~"$client_name"}) 
AND ON (pipeline_id)
topk(5, max by (pipeline_id) (pipeline_start_time))

panels.description: Percentage of requests resulting in a 5xx status code (server errors) over the last minute.

targets.expr:
sum by (pipeline_id)(
  rate(http_request_total{code=~"4..|5..", client=~"$client_name"}[1m])
)
/
sum by (pipeline_id)(
  rate(http_request_total{client=~"$client_name"}[1m])
)
* 100 > 0

AND ON (pipeline_id)
  topk(5, max by (pipeline_id) (pipeline_start_time))

panels.title: Last 5 Pipeline Error Rate

panels.description: 99th Percentile response time in seconds over the last 5 minutes.

targets.expr:
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, pipeline_id) (rate(http_request_duration_bucket{client=~"$client_name"}[1m]))) * 1000 > 0
AND ON (pipeline_id)
topk(5, max by (pipeline_id) (pipeline_start_time))

panels.title: Last 5 Pipeline Latency

targets.expr:
sum by (pipeline_id)(
  http_request_total{client=~"$client_name"})
AND ON (pipeline_id)
topk(5, max by (pipeline_id) (pipeline_start_time))

sum by (pipeline_id) (http_request_duration_sum{client=~"$client_name"})
 AND ON (pipeline_id)
topk(5, max by (pipeline_id) (pipeline_start_time))

panels.description: Percentage of requests resulting in a 5xx status code (server errors) over the last minute.
panels.title: Pipeline Error Rate

panels.description: 99th Percentile response time in seconds over the last 5 minutes.
panels.title: Pipeline Latency (P99)

panels.description: 95th Percentile response time in seconds over the last 5 minutes.
panels.title: Client Latency (Response Time)

targets.expr:
sum by(pipeline_id)(
  sum by (pipeline_id) (pipeline_end_time)
  -
  sum by (pipeline_id) (pipeline_start_time)
) * 1000
AND ON (pipeline_id)
  topk(5, max by (pipeline_id) (pipeline_start_time))

title: dashboard_Rest-API and Redis
